what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a single design-source JPEG image named capital-raise/p-06, including its id, address, channel, blob reference, MIME type, source provenance, author session, creation time, and an empty links list.
observations: YAML frontmatter wraps an asset metadata record
MIME is image/jpeg and name is p-06
Width and height are both recorded as 0
Body text labels it as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-06.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are 0 despite being an image record
Explicit 'design ground-truth' designation in the body
Blob reference is the only content payload
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, and links fields
Follows the ledger pattern of addressable media assets with blob-backed storage
concerns: Zero width and height suggest missing or failed image metadata extraction
No descriptive content about what the image depicts
Empty links list leaves the asset without contextual relationships in this file
notes: A ledger card for a design-source JPEG in the capital-raise set, acting as ground-truth but lacking extracted dimensions and contextual links.
questions: Why are the image width and height both 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-06.jpg contain?
How is this ground-truth image intended to be consumed or referenced by other files?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is 'SOURCE design ground-truth' for an image, and the file does exactly that by cataloging the image with a blob reference and metadata.
intention_signals: To create a stable, addressable record of a source image so it can be referenced as ground-truth within the capital-raise design set.
contribution: Provides a persistent address and blob linkage for a design-source image, enabling the fused system to locate and reference the asset as ground-truth.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-06, linking to a blob and declaring it as design ground-truth with zero recorded dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a source image asset for the capital-raise design set so it can be referenced by address and blob.
